summary.scholar: On November 22, 1963, President John F. Kennedy was assassinated while riding in a motorcade through Dealey Plaza in Dallas, Texas. Vice President Lyndon B. Johnson was sworn in as president aboard Air Force One that afternoon.
summary.explorer: On November 22, 1963, President Kennedy was shot and killed while riding in a car through Dallas, Texas. Vice President Lyndon Johnson became the new president that same day.

significance.scholar: Kennedy assassination shocked the nation and the world. His death at age 46 cut short a presidency that had inspired a generation. The event remains one of the most studied moments in American history.
significance.explorer: The whole country was heartbroken. Kennedy was only 46 years old. People still remember exactly where they were when they heard the news.

sources.citation: John F. Kennedy: Life and Presidency
